content:
The user wants me to create webpage 3 (page-3.html) and link it back to page 2, while preserving the existing page 1 and page 2 links. Looking at the requirements: - page-3.html: title text must include 'Entropy Page 3'; backlink href must be 'page-2.html' - The existing index.html and page-2.html should not be broken I need to create site/page-3.html with: - Title containing 'Entropy Page 3' - A backlink to page-2.html Let me create the page-3.html file. { "files": [ { "path": "site/page-3.html", "content": "\n\n\n \n \n Entropy Page 3\n\n\n
\n Back to Entropy Page 2\n
\n
\n

Welcome to Entropy Page 3

\n

This is the main content area for the third page.

\n
\n\n" } ], "notes": "Created page-3.html with title containing 'Entropy Page 3' and backlink href pointing to 'page-2.html'." }
